ARGUED and tentative ruling adopted except that the motion to strike is GRANTED as to punitive damages against BEI:
Defendant BEVERLY ENTERPRISES CALIFORNIA's Motion to Strike:
Denied as to striking Viola Castro, individual, as a plaintiff.
Denied as to Plaintiff's request for Attorney's Fees.
Granted as to treble damages regarding the negligent misrepresentation cause of action only. Denied as to the remaining causes of action.
Granted as to the Medicare fraud accusations.
Granted as to punitive damages against BEI.
Denied as to Plaintiff's request for jury trial on punitive damages. (JJM/MD)
